prompt: Generate a post-apocalyptic neon wasteland using the time and environment of the image.
prompt_refined: Generate an image depicting the dense urban cityscape from image 1 transformed into a post-apocalyptic neon wasteland. The scene should be set at dusk or night, with the prominent buildings appearing decayed and ruinous. Illuminate the environment with a profusion of glowing neon signs and vibrant architectural lights, casting reflections on the desolate, debris-strewn streets below. Maintain the aerial perspective of image 1, emphasizing the vast, neglected urban sprawl.
